overall.description: A static scene from a video game depicting a dimly lit gothic classroom or great hall with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. The environment features dark wood paneling, tall arched windows, and ornate architectural details typical of a magical school setting.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic classroom or dining hall with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. The room features tall arched windows on the left wall, an ornate wooden doorway at the far end, and dark wood paneling throughout. The atmosphere is dim and moody with cool lighting, and the students remain seated at their tables throughout the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a dimly lit gothic hall where students in dark robes sit in quiet contemplation. It begins with a wide view of the classroom, capturing the moody, cool lighting that casts deep shadows across the dark wood paneling. The camera lingers on the students seated at long wooden tables, emphasizing the stillness of the room. The scene then draws attention to the architectural details, moving from the tall arched windows on the left toward the ornate wooden doorway at the far end of the hall.
